=== Proof skeleton for `netHACVarEst_memLp` ===

  classical
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun Žē => F.netHACVarEst Žē) := by

  have hpt : ŌłĆ Žē, |F.netHACVarEst Žē| Ōēż (Fintype.card V : ŌäØ) * ((m : ŌäØ) * B ^ 2) := by
    intro Žē
    calc |F.netHACVarEst Žē|
        = |Ōłæ i, Ōłæ j Ōłł F.nbhd i, F.X i Žē * F.X j Žē| := rfl
      _ Ōēż Ōłæ i, |Ōłæ j Ōłł F.nbhd i, F.X i Žē * F.X j Žē| := Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
      _ Ōēż Ōłæ i, Ōłæ j Ōłł F.nbhd i, |F.X i Žē * F.X j Žē| :=
          Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _)
      _ Ōēż Ōłæ i, Ōłæ j Ōłł F.nbhd i, B * B :=
          Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum (fun j _ => by
            rw [abs_mul]; exact mul_le_mul (hbound i Žē) (hbound j Žē) (abs_nonneg _) hB))
      _ = Ōłæ i, ((F.nbhd i).card : ŌäØ) * (B * B) := by
          refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => ?_); rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
      _ Ōēż Ōłæ _i : V, (m : ŌäØ) * (B * B) := by
          refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => ?_)
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (by positivity)

      _ = (Fintype.card V : ŌäØ) * ((m : ŌäØ) * B ^ 2) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, nsmul_eq_mul]; ring
  exact MemLp.of_bound hmeas.aestronglyMeasurable ((Fintype.card V : ŌäØ) * ((m : ŌäØ) * B ^ 2))
